  "findings": [
    "Window pan flashing is absent, violating prescriptive flashing requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the window unit, install compliant sill pan flashing integrated with the WRB, and reinstall the window."
  ],
  "rationale": "IRC Section R703.4 requires flashing to be installed in such a manner as to prevent moisture from entering the wall cavity. Manufacturer instructions for modern window installations universally require a sill pan flashing (either rigid or flexible membrane) integrated with the weather-resistive barrier (WRB) to drain any water that penetrates the window assembly. Proceeding without pan flashing will lead to water intrusion and structural rot.",
  "references": [
    "IRC R703.4",
    "IRC R703.8",
    "Manufacturer Installation Instructions"
  ]
}
